newspaper: Unknown (likely a Rio de Janeiro newspaper based on context)
date_of_article: 1906 (based on the Caixa de Conversão discussion)
original_snippet_context: Report on a banquet held for deputy Lamounier Godofredo by his fellow Mineiro deputies.
relevant_quote: Como os leitores se lembram, os srs. Francisco Bernardino e Lamounier Godofredo, ainda ha dias votaram contra o projecto da Caixa de Conversão.
justification: The text simply states the deputies' vote against the Caixa de Conversão project without further commentary on their motivations or the project's merits.
